Meta.title: Ilona Hakalo — Shopify Developer
Meta.description: Frontend developer building custom Shopify storefronts on Liquid and Hydrogen. 6+ years of production experience with React, TypeScript and headless commerce.

Hero.headline: I build Shopify storefronts that don't feel like Shopify.
Hero.subhead: Custom Liquid themes and Hydrogen headless storefronts for DTC brands. 6+ years in production, working solo and end-to-end.

Footer.tagline: Built with care in Next.js, TypeScript and Tailwind.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: This page doesn't exist yet — or it took the day off.

Services.title: Four ways I help Shopify brands
Services.note: every project is end-to-end, no agency overhead

page.title: Shopify, end-to-end
page.subhead: From custom Liquid themes to fully headless Hydrogen storefronts, app stack design, and performance work. Every engagement is direct — founder to developer, no middle layer.

liquid.title: Custom Liquid Themes
liquid.description: Bespoke Shopify storefronts built from scratch — or rebuilt out of generic templates — on Online Store 2.0. Sections, blocks, metaobjects, custom product templates, complex discount logic.

hydrogen.title: Headless with Hydrogen
hydrogen.description: Full headless storefronts on Shopify Hydrogen + Remix — for brands that have outgrown Liquid. Faster pages, richer UX, full design freedom via the Storefront API.

apps.title: App Stack & Integrations
apps.description: Picking and wiring the right Shopify apps for the job — Sika, Klaviyo, Recharge, Stripe, Builder.io, Mixpanel — instead of bloating the store with apps the brand doesn't need.

performance.title: Performance & Migrations
performance.description: Fixing slow themes, migrating from Liquid to Hydrogen, optimizing Core Web Vitals, and bringing storefronts back into the green on Lighthouse.

AboutSnippet.title: Six years of building. One year deep on Shopify.
AboutSnippet.body: I'm a frontend developer with 6+ years of production experience across e-commerce, fintech, healthcare and SaaS. For the past year I've gone deep on Shopify — both classic Liquid and modern Hydrogen — and it's become my main craft. I work solo and end-to-end: from the first founder call to the live storefront.

Process.title: From idea to live storefront in four steps

discovery.title: Discovery call
discovery.description: We jump on a 30-minute call. You tell me the goal, the timeline, and the constraints. I tell you what's realistic and where I see risks.

scope.title: Scope & estimate
scope.description: I write a focused scope doc with milestones, deliverables, and a fixed-price or hourly estimate. No fluff, no surprises.

build.title: Build in the open
build.description: I ship in small, demoable chunks on a staging URL. You see progress every few days. Tight feedback loop, no telephone game.

ship.title: Ship & support
ship.description: Launch day plan, a healthy QA pass, and 30 days of post-launch support included. After that, an optional retainer if you want me around.

CTABanner.title: Got a Shopify project on your hands?
CTABanner.subtitle: I'm taking on a small number of new engagements — custom theme builds, headless migrations, and ongoing development partnerships.

page.title: Working notes from the Shopify trenches
page.subhead: Liquid tricks, Hydrogen gotchas, app-stack opinions, and the occasional teardown. Written for the developer I was three years ago.

post.minRead: {minutes, plural, =1 {1 min read} other {# min read}}
post.fallbackNotice: Not translated yet — showing the English version.

empty.title: Nothing here yet
empty.description: First post is on its way. Subscribe to my LinkedIn for the heads-up.

page.title: Let's talk about your Shopify project
page.subhead: Book a 30-minute intro call below, or drop me an email. I usually reply within one business day.

Contact.scheduleHint: Tap a slot to book a 30-min intro call. The form below collects what we'll discuss.

otherWays.heading: Other ways to reach me
otherWays.responseTime: Usually replies within 24 hours on weekdays.

page.title: From frontend to Shopify obsession
page.subhead: Six years of production, fifteen shipped projects, one growing focus on commerce.

intro.p1: I'm Ilona — a frontend developer with a Computer Software Engineering degree and 6+ years writing React in production. For the last year I've been deep in Shopify, working across both ends of the stack: classic Liquid theme work and modern Hydrogen headless storefronts.
intro.p2: Before Shopify, I built things for fund managers, healthcare analysts, a fintech patent platform, an OKR system, a subscription-management tool, and a half-dozen other apps across fintech, healthcare, and SaaS. Charts, complex state, multi-step forms — that's home turf.
intro.p3: What changed: commerce is where engineering meets a real business problem most days. Subscriptions, configurators, on-the-fly variants, headless migrations — that work compounds. Today I take on Shopify projects directly with founders, ship them end-to-end, and stick around for support.

start.title: First production React
start.description: Streaming service library visualization, full-stack with Node.js + MongoDB. NASA Space Apps Challenge participant the same year.

midweb.title: Dashboards, charts, complex state
midweb.description: OKR management app, UI Kit documentation, bookkeeping for SMEs, fund-managers portal. Redux Saga, Material UI, Highcharts, lots of typed data.

fintech.title: Fintech, healthcare, blockchain
fintech.description: Company patent app (React + blockchain). Healthcare analytics platform (Vue + Django). Public speaking, code review, technical mentorship.

stripe.title: Subscriptions & e-commerce roots
stripe.description: Subscription management scripts on Stripe API. Membership platform with Stripe + Builder.io + Mixpanel. Started feeling the commerce gravity.

shopify.title: Shopify specialist
shopify.description: Full Hydrogen + Remix headless rebuild for a sports DTC brand. Live Liquid theme work. App stack design with Sika, Klaviyo, Recharge. Direct-to-founder freelance only.

values.title: Four things I won't compromise on

direct.title: Direct, no middle layer
direct.description: You talk to me, I write the code. No account manager, no PM, no telephone-game between idea and implementation.

smallChunks.title: Ship in small chunks
smallChunks.description: Every few days you see progress on a staging URL. Feedback loops are tight, course-corrections cheap. No big surprise reveals.

plainEnglish.title: Plain English, no jargon
plainEnglish.description: I explain trade-offs without hiding behind technical vocabulary. You should always know what you're paying for and why.

ownership.title: End-to-end ownership
ownership.description: I scope, build, ship, and support. Thirty days of post-launch fixes are always included — and an optional retainer if you want me around.

beyond.title: When I'm not in VS Code
beyond.body: I read a lot of design systems, watch DTC brands evolve, and quietly judge bad checkout UX. I speak Russian and English daily, and I'm picking up Spanish & Portuguese — slowly enough that translating my own portfolio felt like a reasonable side project.
